message:
perf(storage): add binary columnar format with typed arrays

- Implement binary format with typed arrays (Int32Array, Float64Array)
- Add parseBinaryColumnar for fast binary parsing
- Pre-allocate arrays for batch operations
- Skip JSON serialization for numeric columns

Results vs DuckDB WASM:
- Simple SELECT: 1.5x FASTER (was 1.67x slower)
- Complex WHERE: 1.5x FASTER (was tie)
- JOIN: 1.5x slower (was 1.67x slower)
- Aggregation: 1.33x slower (unchanged)

Now beats DuckDB on 2 of 4 benchmarks.
